name: Baotou Tomorrow Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Baotou Tomorrow Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells chemical products and hardware primarily in Inner Mongolia autonomous region, China. It also develops software and provides related technical services. The company is involved in the exploitation and processing of coal; and energy industry investment and property development businesses. Baotou Tomorrow Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Baotou, China.
